name: Chili Primero
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Smoked bacon, cut into 3/8-inch pieces
4 lb Round steak, cut into 1/4-inch cubes
(optional) 4 oz Can diced, pickled cactus, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, brown the bacon; drain and set aside, reserving grease.
2. In the same skillet, brown the round steak.
3. Add the browned round steak and bacon pieces to a large stockpot.
4. Stir in tomatoes with liquid, tomato sauce, tomato paste, green chilies, jalapenos, and cactus (if using).
5. Heat to simmering.
6. In the same skillet, saute onions in 1/2 of the reserved bacon grease until transparent.
7. Add the onions to the stockpot.
8. Repeat with green peppers.
9. Stir in parsley, coriander, garlic, cumin, cayenne pepper, oregano, paprika, salt, pepper, lemon juice, and chili powders.
10. Cook over low heat for 1 hour, stirring occasionally to prevent sticking.
11. Sprinkle masa harina over the soup and stir.
12. Simmer covered for 4 hours.
13. Garnish each serving with sour cream and shredded cheese (cheddar and Monterey Jack).
